headline: Exelon on Affordability and Reliability: "We Hear You" and Here’s How We’re Stepping Up
summary: CHICAGO, July 15, 2026--As rising energy supply costs continue placing a financial burden on families and small businesses, Exelon launched its new "ON for You" advertising campaign featuring real customers discussing energy affordability and reliability while underscoring the public utility company’s efforts to keep bills as low as possible and deliver safe, reliable energy to the communities it serves.
